title: 頼れるお姉さんも、実は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I are out for a drive when we
decide to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, look! There's a crepe shop!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know I'm up for it! It's the perfect time for a
snack.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's order different ones and share!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's order different ones and share!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll get the tiramisu crepe! You can choose
whatever you like, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll get the tiramisu crepe! You can choose
whatever you like, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky and I enjoy the delicious crepes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That was scrumptious! It practically melted in my
mouth!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it was nice to see your happy face! Heehee!
Thanks for the snack! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it was nice to see your happy face! Heehee!
What a great snack! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for going out with me today! Well, not just that... Thanks for going out with me all the time!
choice_data_list: It's worth it just to see you happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's so much fun to go out with someone! I get
pretty bored when I'm alone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But there aren't many classmates I can go for a
drive with. It's weird—they always complain about
how fast I drive...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for you, every day would be kinda
lonely...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for you, every day would be kinda
lonely...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What? Well, hmm, I hadn't really thought about
it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I guess so. My parents had a maid who was
always there for me when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if growing up that way made me feel
safer when I'm with someone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm used to living alone now, but I don't spend
much time at home to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I really do get lonely easily.
choice_data_list: I learned something new about you.
I'll be there for you whenever you're lonely.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yeah... Oh, no! I've let you in on a very
important secret! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell anyone, okay? I have to be a strong
role model for the other students.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know it is! I trust you to keep it safe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know it is! I trust you to keep it safe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've got it! How about you tell me a secret of
yours in return? Then we'll be even!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've got it! How about you tell me a secret of
yours in return? Then we'll be even!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That's totally bogus! No fair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending some quality time with
Maruzensky, I feel that we've grown closer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ You're always so kind.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ You're always so kind.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why I never realized I was a lonely
person until now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When I go to the academy, I get to see you and
everyone else, and we have so much fun together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When I go to the academy, I get to see you and
everyone else, and we have so much fun together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, now that I'm aware of it, I might just
take advantage of your kindness a little more...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So come on! My need for speed hasn't been satisfied yet. Let's continue our drive! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you just say that if I'm ever lonely, you'll
be there for me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you just say that if I'm ever lonely, you'll
be there for me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's the answer I was looking for! ♪ Now, let's really floor it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we have fun driving around until the
sun fades from view.
